summary: Hoffmann Green Cement Technologies Soci√É¬©t√É¬© anonyme manufactures and sells low carbon cement. It offers low carbon concrete blocks for the construction industry, as well as cement for making low carbon cement edges, non-polluting concrete slabs, low carbon cement prefabricated stairs, and draining pavements. The company is headquartered in Rives de l'Yon, France.
